message:
chore: update UBS scan results reflecting reduced critical count (332→309)

Refreshes findings.jsonl and ubs_crit.jsonl with the latest UBS v5.0.7
scan output from 2026-03-04. The critical finding count dropped from
332 to 309 (23 fewer criticals) and warnings from 26723 to 26159,
reflecting recent bug fixes across the codebase. Clears stale data
from ubs_crit.jsonl that referenced older scan timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
